title: 如何看待Project2025说中国政治权利来自5000年的专制，因此只能通过外力解决？
meta_description: 如何看待Project2025说中国政治权利来自5000年的专制，因此只能通过外力解决？ - [quote]As with all global struggles with Communist and other tyrannical regimes, the issue should not be with the Chinese people...
meta_keywords: 看待,project2025,中国,政治权利,来自,5000,专制,只能,外力,解决
contents:
As with all global struggles with Communist and other tyrannical regimes, the issue should not be with the Chinese people but with the Communist dictatorship that oppresses them and threatens the well-being of nations across the globe.

That said, the nature of Chinese power today is the product of history, ideology, and institutions that have governed China during the course of five millennia, inherited by the present Chinese leaders from the preceding generations of the CCP.  In short, the PRC challenge is deeply rooted in China’s strategic culture and not just the Marxism–Leninism of the CCP, meaning that internal culture and civil society will never deliver a more normative nation. The PRC’s aggressive behavior can only be curbed through external pressure.

discussions.content: 外国人终于有开窍的了。
